category_sources: source_facts.description says lit is a portable tool for LLVM- and Clang-style test suites; official LLVM command guide says lit executes LLVM and Clang style test suites.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lit; official LLVM command guide title is lit - LLVM Integrated Tester.
docs_sources: Official LLVM command guide provides lit documentation.
repo_sources: Official LLVM GitHub repository is llvm/llvm-project; lit is documented as an LLVM tool and source_facts.homepage is llvm.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official LLVM command guide identify lit as the LLVM/Clang style test-suite runner.
